text.title: spatial-ui-patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the spatial-ui-patterns methodology end-to-end.

step.name: assign-panel-type
step.action: Pick one of {world-locked, head-locked, body-locked, hand-attached}. Reject head-locked unless safety-telemetry justification.
step.decision-gate: If any visionOS panel = head-locked without safety justification, reject.

step.name: set-distance-and-size
step.action: Set default distance ≥1 m (1.5-2.0 m preferred). Set touch-target size ≥60 pt at 1 m.
step.decision-gate: Reject if distance < 1 m or target < 60 pt.

step.name: fov-occupancy-check
step.action: Sum primary panel FoV occupancy; cap at 40%. Move secondary panels to body-locked off-FoV.
